# Geotecnia1 — Jundiai

> Geotechnical engineering services in Jundiai, Brasil.

## Contact
- Website: https://jundiai.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Jundiai, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
